settings.name: Nose
settings.notes: Rich dark caramel and toasted oak lead, followed by waves of dried cherry, old leather, and a delicate thread of pipe tobacco. Deeper still, there is brown butter, holiday baking spice, and a faint wisp of cedar.

settings.name: Palate
settings.notes: Full-bodied and velvety. Immediate dark toffee gives way to charred oak, vanilla bean, and a lush black cherry sweetness. Mid-palate reveals cinnamon, clove, and hints of dark chocolate. Beautifully integrated proof with no harshness.

settings.name: Finish
settings.notes: Extraordinarily long and warming. Lingering oak tannins intertwine with caramel and dried fruit. A gentle leather and tobacco fade carries on for minutes, leaving a final impression of toasted walnut and aged maple.

settings.title: 17-Year Seepin' Beauty
settings.subtitle: Single Barrel Kentucky Straight Bourbon
settings.summary_quote: A bourbon of extraordinary patience—17 years of quiet transformation yielding a whiskey that is at once powerful and profoundly refined.

settings.text: Pour neat into a Glencairn glass and let rest for 5–10 minutes. At 107.6 proof, a few drops of water will open up additional layers of complexity. Nosing first without swirling allows the most delicate aromatics to present themselves. On the palate, let the bourbon coat your tongue before noting the evolution from entry through mid-palate to the long, warming finish.
